name: github-webhook-verify
description: Verify a GitHub webhook signature. Reads the X-Hub-Signature-256 header and HMAC-verifies it against the request body using the GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET env var. On match, falls through; on mismatch (or missing signature), throws GlobalError(401) with a structured reason that the catch arm / Studio can branch on. Demonstrates the @blokjs/hmac-verify helper in its canonical webhook-auth role. Production note: the helper signs the JSON-stringified ctx.request.body — fine when GitHub's signature was computed over the same JSON shape, which it is by default for application/json payloads. If the trigger ever serves application/x-www-form-urlencoded webhook bodies, byte-exact verification needs a raw-body capture upstream of the JSON parser.
